evals.prompt: Upgrade universal-plugin to the latest version across this project.
evals.expected_output: Runs `npm view universal-plugin version` to resolve the latest version, greps all .md/.json/.yaml/.ts/.js files for `npx universal-plugin@`, reports how many files and occurrences were found with current pinned versions, then asks for confirmation before applying any changes.

evals.prompt: Pin all npx universal-plugin calls to version 2.3.1.
evals.expected_output: Uses 2.3.1 directly without fetching from npm. If the current pins are on a different major (e.g. 1.x), warns about a cross-major bump and requires explicit confirmation before proceeding. Within the same major, shows files and confirms before applying.

Finds all `npx universal-plugin@1.4.0` occurrences (same major), shows the list, confirms with the user, then applies replacements using the Edit tool (not sed). Re-runs the grep after to verify no old pins remain, then commits with `chore: upgrade npx universal-plugin pin to @1.5.0`.

evals.prompt: There are no npx universal-plugin@ calls in this project. Upgrade to the latest.
evals.expected_output: Resolves the latest version, runs the grep, finds zero occurrences, and reports that there is nothing to upgrade — no files are modified and no commit is created.

Detects a major-version boundary (1.x → 2.x), warns the user that cross-major bumps may include breaking changes, and requires explicit confirmation before applying. Proceeds only after confirmation, then applies, verifies, and commits.
